title: Luish's Guns Crafting Add-on
description: Add-on for Luish's Guns that adds crafting recipes
body:
Simple add-on that makes weapons from the [Luish's Guns mod/datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/luishs-guns) craftable.

### Rifle Crafting
![Rifle Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A9HM0lEo/images/400b19add641307be5f7a2746a642fc9e0030c35.png)

### Shotgun Crafting
![Shotgun Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A9HM0lEo/images/e7abb182285e84b1daa59b842f8bb3815f08ee3b.png)

### Double-Barreled Shotgun Crafting
![Double-Barreled Shotgun Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/A9HM0lEo/images/2f867daf43292018af2b373b29e68d85a8e4981f.png)
##
<details>
<summary>Why a separate add-on and not included within the mod/datapack itself?</summary>
Crafting may be slightly broken from a survival-friendly experience. Additionally, because it's based on a datapack, crafting can't be modular within the original datapack/mod.

Furthermore, the creator's original plans were to make a special crafting table for weapons, which development has been delayed over time and could not be included in the original project.
</details>
